__doc__: DUP-1 single source of truth for the runtime file set that must stay in sync
across the four consumers below. The preflight `release-files` guard
(scripts/check-release-files.mjs) parses each consumer and fails if it drifts
from this file. When you add or remove a shipped runtime file, edit THIS file
first; preflight then names exactly which consumer lists to update.
Consumers and what each must contain:
Why the asymmetry is intentional: the .env templates + the three runtime
scripts are BUNDLED + EXTRACTED (so a fresh install can read them) but not
self-updated/signed individually (gui/ and scripts/ ship as whole subdirs on
the network path). sidecar.rs does not re-extract gui/ (served from the bundle).
